description_long: This is a medium-sized, modern backpack with a streamlined, rounded rectangular shape and a minimalist design. The main body is covered in a muted brown fabric, complemented by darker brown straps and accents. Two symmetrical side pockets are attached, each with a strap and buckle detail, providing extra storage. The backpack features two wide, adjustable shoulder straps and a central vertical strap running from the top to the bottom, secured with a metallic buckle. The surface appears to be made of a durable, canvas-like textile, with no visible logos or decorative patterns. The overall construction suggests functionality and comfort for daily urban use.
description: A brown, minimalist backpack with side pockets, wide adjustable straps, and a central vertical strap with a metallic buckle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main body, central vertical strap with a metallic buckle, and both side pockets.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the side pocket, the thickness of the main compartment, and the attachment of the shoulder straps.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the two wide shoulder straps and the top of the backpack, with the central strap visible at the top.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the right side pocket and the profile of the main compartment.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, adjustable shoulder straps made of dark brown fabric, with a central vertical strap running down the front and over the top, secured by a metallic buckle. No chest or waist straps are visible.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment, two external side pockets with flap and buckle closures, no visible front or mesh pockets.
